action.reasoning: Observation: baseline pipeline almost worked; failure is a simple API misuse because TSR has no model.device attribute. Analysis: the documented API says call model([pil_image], device=device), so predict.py should track the torch device explicitly. We should also make local smoke test robust and immediately submit eval after fixing, per the required early-baseline workflow. Decision: patch predict.py to pass device through render_object, keep offline loading, run a quick local prediction test on val data, then submit the existing checkpoint for evaluation.
